title: Milk Thermometer for Coffee with 175 mm Stainless Steel Probe and Clip Professional Barista Milk Temperature Probe Frothing Thermometer Coffee Machine Accessories
features: MILK FROTHING THERMOMETER - High quality Barista milk thermometer for coffee with colour coded zones for easy milk temperature probe monitoring.

GREAT FOR FANCY COFFEE - An ideal tool for every coffee lover to enhance their coffee accessories and equipment. Fast and easy temperature reading of your milk to assist in making the perfect coffee, latte, cappuccino, etc
CAN IT BE CALIBRATED - Yes, the milk frothing thermometer can be calibrated and has ice test and boil test markers at 0°C and 100°C
QUALITY GUARANTEED - Our carefully sourced range of milk thermometers and coffee machine accessories are very accurate and reliable.
EXCEPTIONAL CUSTOMER SERVICE - With a wealth of experience our Thermometer World team are here to help with any questions you may have.
